description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:7.10.1 Docker image for all jobs, with three stages: check-style, test-code, and test-coverage. Add a check job in the check-style stage that runs before_script npm install npm@5.2.0, node_modules/.bin/npm install eslint@4.7.0, node --version, node_modules/.bin/npm --version, caches the node_modules directory, excludes tags, sets NODE_ENV=development, and executes node_modules/.bin/eslint test/**/*.js and node_modules/.bin/eslint src/**/*.js. Add a test job in the test-code stage that runs before_script npm install npm@5.2.0, node_modules/.bin/npm install, node --version, node_modules/.bin/npm --version, caches node_modules, excludes tags, sets NODE_ENV=test, and runs node_modules/.bin/gulp test. Add a coverage job in the test-coverage stage that runs before_script npm install npm@5.2.0, node_modules/.bin/npm install, node --version, node_modules/.bin/npm --version, caches node_modules, excludes tags, sets NODE_ENV=test, runs node_modules/.bin/npm test, and publishes the coverage directory as an artifact.
